description: Emissive throb on a material slot. Used to draw the user's eye to a specific spatial element during a sequence — e.g. each callout pulses as its narration plays.

colorHex.desc: Emissive tint applied during the pulse.

intensity.desc: Peak emissiveIntensity at the apex of each pulse.

pulses.desc: Number of sinusoidal cycles within the duration.

notes: Walks every Mesh under the target. For materials that don't support emissive (e.g. UnlitMaterial / panels), the handler falls back to a brief scale-up pulse so the element still reads as 'attention'.
